SYNC FROM GOOGLE SHEETS ✕
Step 1. Open your Google Sheet → Extensions → Apps Script
Step 2. Paste the SC_Kiosk_AppScript.js code and save
Step 3. Click Deploy → New Deployment → Web App
         Execute as: Me  |  Who has access: Anyone
Step 4. Copy the Web App URL and paste below
APPS SCRIPT WEB APP URL
URL must start with https://script.google.com/macros/s/ and end with /exec
Get it from: Apps Script → Deploy → Manage deployments → copy URL

SECURITY NOTICE
Please note that passwords are stored on a personal Google Sheet and will be seen by the owner of this tool.

Do not use a password you do not wish to be seen.
